markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on content strategy between Hyperexponential and GrowthX.ai to establish content pillars, workflow processes, and plan for US market expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas platform setup complete with initial content strategy focused on 4 key topic clusters: AI transformation, platform vs point solutions, operations/pricing, and portfolio intelligence](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Planning SEO-driven content approach with only 104 current organic keywords vs competitors' hundreds/thousands; keyword research in progress for next week's discussion](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Content publication path to use Framer instead of Storyblock for automation; potential for specialized content zones (guides vs thought leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [Agreed to prioritize calibrating initial content to company context/personas before expanding to programmatic content and potential newsletter/CUO.com strategy](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2432.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Platform Demonstration

  - [Erik showcased Atlas, GrowthX's content generation platform with two key pipelines:](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
      - [Assignments pipeline: Converts keyword research into structured assignments/blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [Article generation pipeline: End-to-end workflow integrating company context, target audience personas, and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [Platform incorporates perplexity research step to ensure content depth beyond surface-level information](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Includes automated fact-checking, SEO meta tag generation, and internal/external link insertion](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Feature image generation capability available but pending discussion on implementation approach](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

### Content Strategy Framework

  - [Primary objective: Position HX as leading AI transformation platform for commercial P\&C insurance](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=715.0)
  - [Current status: Only 104 organic keywords (mostly branded) vs competitors (Earnix, Federado) with hundreds/thousands](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=805.0)
  - [Four key topic clusters identified:](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
    1.  AI transformation platform for commercial insurance (targeting chief AI officers, digital transformation leads)
    2.  Platform vs point solution evaluation comparisons
    3.  Commercial insurance operations and pricing transformation
    4.  Insurance analytics and portfolio intelligence
  - [David suggested researching "underwriter workbench" as important competitive area that prospects consider platform-like](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [Additional competitors identified beyond Earnix/Federado: Cytora, Sixfold, Ascend, SEND](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)

### Content Publication Strategy

  - [Current Storyblock process too manual; agreed to build connection to new Framer platform instead](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
  - [Discussed potential SEO and reader experience approaches:](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2067.0)
    1.  Editorial content for thought leadership (upper funnel)
    2.  Programmatic guide-style content for product-specific topics (lower funnel)
    3.  Potential specialized domain (CUO.com) for thought leadership with newsletter component
  - [Potential content distribution: 70% focus on branded environment with newsletter aggregating industry news, 30% on competitive content](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2321.0)

### Persona Documents Review

  - [Created from existing HX personas with additional research on typical content authors relevant to target audience](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2521.0)
  - [David noted some UK-specific references (Lloyd's) that should be removed/adjusted](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2587.0)
  - [Some concerns about over-indexing on actuarial specifics rather than product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2659.0)
  - [Team will focus initially on underwriter and IT personas rather than actuaries](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2761.0)

## Next Steps

  - [David to provide feedback on artifacts shared in Slack (company context, personas, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Erik to send content strategy document for review and share more specifics on keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Team to explore setting up automated publishing to Framer platform](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)
  - [Next meeting Monday to review keyword research and initial blog topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2882.0)
  - [Team to provide recommendations on content types and publication strategy (editorial vs programmatic)](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=2067.0)
  - [David to search for product demo videos to provide additional context, especially for ingestion/triage functionality](https://fathom.video/share/EzE7X8co-m6kysRY9ztXBJf-9dRcWu6G?tab=summary&timestamp=1778.0)
